channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: nexu-io/nexu
item.description: The simplest desktop client for OpenClaw 🦞 — bridge your Agent to WeChat, Feishu, Slack & Discord in one click. Works with Claude Code, Codex & any LLM. BYOK, local-first, chat from your phone 24/7.

item.title: MiniMax-AI/skills
item.description: (no description)

item.title: m1heng/claude-plugin-weixin
item.description: (no description)

item.title: wong2/weixin-agent-sdk
item.description: (no description)

item.title: mohebifar/tooscut
item.description: Professional video editing, right in your browser. Made with Rust, WebGPU, WASM, and Tanstack Start.

item.title: kenforthewin/atomic
item.description: (no description)

item.title: hectorvent/floci
item.description: Light, fluffy, and always free - AWS Local Emulator

item.title: louislva/claude-peers-mcp
item.description: Allow all your Claude Codes to message each other ad-hoc!

item.title: joeseesun/markdown-proxy
item.description: Fetch any URL as clean Markdown via proxy services (r.jina.ai / defuddle.md) or built-in scripts. Works with login-required pages like X/Twitter, WeCh

item.title: gnekt/My-Brain-Is-Full-Crew
item.description: Built by a PhD whose memory was failing, whose diet was a mess, and whose anxiety had its own agenda. Most second brain tools ignore the fact that your brain doesn't work in isolation — your body and your mental health are part of the system too. This crew handles all three: knowledge, nutrition, and mental wellness.

item.title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
item.description: Claude Code skills that turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about (Multi-platform e.g., Codex are supported).

item.title: ghostty-org/ghostling
item.description: A minimum viable terminal emulator built on top of the libghostty C API. Ex minimo, infinita nascuntur. 👻🐣

item.title: Nunchi-trade/auto-researchtrading
item.description: (no description)

item.title: jakemor/kanna
item.description: A beautiful web-based UI for Claude Code & Codex

item.title: raskrebs/sonar
item.description: CLI tool for inspecting and managing services listening on localhost ports

item.title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
item.description: 734+ structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · MITRE ATT&CK mapped · agentskills.io open standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · Penetration testing, DFIR, threat intel, cloud security & more · Apache 2.0

item.title: mattpocock/skills
item.description: My personal directory of skills, straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: garrytan/gstack
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 15 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

item.title: math-inc/OpenGauss
item.description: (no description)

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: run-llama/liteparse
item.description: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser

item.title: EverMind-AI/MSA
item.description: (no description)

item.title: mattprusak/autoresearch-genealogy
item.description: Structured prompts, vault templates, and archive guides for AI-assisted genealogy research. Built for Claude Code.

item.title: zerobootdev/zeroboot
item.description: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes for AI agents via copy-on-write forking

item.title: rivet-dev/secure-exec
item.description: Secure Node.js Execution Without a Sandbox A lightweight library for secure Node.js execution. No containers, no VMs — just npm-compatible sandboxing out of the box.

item.title: openai/parameter-golf
item.description: Train the smallest LM you can that fits in 16MB. Best model wins!

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-codex-subagents
item.description: A collection of 130+ specialized Codex subagents covering a wide range of development use cases.

item.title: HKUDS/ClawTeam
item.description: ClawTeam: Agent Swarm Intelligence (One Command → Full Automation)

item.title: EricLengyel/Slug
item.description: Reference code for the Slug Algorithm.

item.title: yazinsai/OpenOats
item.description: A meeting note-taker that talks back.

item.title: adammiribyan/zeroboot
item.description: Sub-millisecond VM sandboxes for AI agents via copy-on-write forking

item.title: grimmory-tools/grimmory
item.description: Grimmory is the successor of booklore.

item.title: HKUDS/CLI-Anything
item.description: CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native

item.title: basecamp/once
item.description: Easy self-hosting for Docker-based web apps

item.title: NVIDIA/OpenShell
item.description: OpenShell is the safe, private runtime for autonomous AI agents.

item.title: NVIDIA/NemoClaw
item.description: NVIDIA plugin for secure installation of OpenClaw

item.title: Martian-Engineering/lossless-claw
item.description: Lossless Claw — LCM (Lossless Context Management) plugin for OpenClaw

item.title: THU-MAIC/OpenMAIC
item.description: Open Multi-Agent Interactive Classroom — Get an immersive, multi-agent learning experience in just one click

item.title: MoonshotAI/Attention-Residuals
item.description: (no description)

item.title: rasbt/llm-architecture-gallery
item.description: LLM Architecture Gallery source data

item.title: karpathy/jobs
item.description: A research tool for visually exploring Bureau of Labor Statistics Occupational Outlook Handbook data. This is not a report, a paper, or a serious economic publication — it is a development tool for exploring BLS data visually.

item.title: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel
item.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it.

item.title: TomBadash/Mouser
item.description: A lightweight, open-source alternative to Logitech Options+ for remapping buttons on the Logitech MX Master 3S mouse

item.title: jackwener/opencli
item.description: Make any website your CLI. A powerful, AI-native runtime for seamless browser automation and dynamic web data extraction.

item.title: webadderall/Recordly
item.description: A free, open-source Screen Studio alternative that adds auto-zoom, cursor animations and more to your screen recordings. Substantially modifies the OpenScreen foundation.

item.title: aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw
item.description: Fully autonomous research from idea to paper. Chat an Idea. Get a Paper. Fully Autonomous. 🦞

item.title: calesthio/Crucix
item.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes.

item.title: langflow-ai/openrag
item.description: OpenRAG is a comprehensive, single package Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch.

item.title: dRoninFlight/dRonin
item.description: The dRonin flight controller software.
